CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnBeginPlay
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local tweenLine = self.Entity.TweenLineComponent
if tweenLine == nil then tweenLine = self.Entity:AddComponent(TweenLineComponent) end
tweenLine.Positions:Clear() tweenLine.Positions:Add(Vector2(0, 0)) -- 왼쪽 tweenLine.Positions:Add(Vector2(0, 3)) -- 위
tweenLine.Duration = 8 -- 숫자 높일수록 더 천천히 이동 tweenLine.StopType = TweenLinearStopType.RepeatRoundTrip tweenLine.AutoStart = true
